---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for ipfs-shard
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How you envision this feature working. Include any relevant pseudocode or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

What specific use cases or scenarios would benefit from this feature?

## Additional Context

Any additional context (related issues, relevant documentation, design docs, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature
